prompt: Edit image 1: Segment the beetles and apply the realistic fur texture and detailing from the tiger in image 2 to their exoskeletons. Segment the small orange flowers and replace them with insertions of the peering mole from image 3.

Concurrently, segment all clusters of small orange flowers on the branches in image 1 and replace each cluster with an insertion of the peering mole from image 3, ensuring the mole's head is visible.
objects: two beetles with realistic fur texture and striped detailing
